text:
There once was a brave squirrel named Woody who decided to explore a city full of wonders. Woody lived in a small pine tree near the park, so he didn't get to see much of the world. One sunny morning, he saw a peculiar machine on one of the buildings' corners.

The machine was big and metal, and it had wheels. Woody quickly climbed down to investigate. Inside the machine, he found gears, little lights, and what looked like something small and furry trapped inside a cage.

Mesmerized, Woody reached into the machine. The thing inside blinked at him, surprised.

"Woohoo!" exclaimed Woody. He opened the cage wide and the thing hopped out excitedly. It was a rabbit!

Woody taught the bunny how to use the machine. Together they explored the city. The machine couldn't fly, but on flat surfaces, it could scoot along. They found park benches, windowsills, and even a giant icicle.
